positive: An intricate and ornate celestial map mandala design. The pattern must incorporate constellations, crescent moons, and stylized astrological symbols, rendered in deep indigo and shimmering gold foil accents. Art Nouveau influence, radial symmetry, highly detailed, geometric, mystical, zillij style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, simple, cartoon, linear sketch, flat colors
